message:
feat(browser): add encryption at rest, remove framework bindings

- Add AES-256-GCM encryption for Store with async key callback
  - getEncryptionKey option in lanceStore() / Store constructor
  - Key can be string (hashed to 256-bit), Uint8Array, ArrayBuffer, or CryptoKey
  - Encrypted files use .enc extension, unencrypted use .json
- Remove React/Vue/Svelte framework bindings (document core API instead)
- Remove framework generation from build.js
- All OPFS operations now through SharedWorker single code path

Usage:
  const store = await lanceStore('vault', {
    getEncryptionKey: async () => password
  });
